basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on 09 July 2026 on the official website aiims.edu. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced for the Senior Project Associate post through the AIIMS Delhi Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST up to 5 years, OBC up to 3 years.

qualification.education_qualification: First Class Graduate in Science Field with 2 years of research experience, First Class Master's Degree in Science field, Experience in clinical research or related field, Excellent reading comprehension and writing skills, Proficiency in Microsoft Office applications
qualification.details: First Class Graduate in Science Field with 2 years of research experience OR First Class Master's Degree in Science field. Experience in clinical research or related field. Excellent reading comprehension and writing skills. Proficiency in Microsoft Office applications.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Delhi Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 23-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Delhi Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 23-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Delhi Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Delhi Senior Project Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the AIIMS Delhi Senior Project Associate position is 23rd July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Project Associate post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a First Class Graduate in Science Field with 2 years of research experience or a First Class Master's Degree in Science field. Additional experience in clinical research is also preferred.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Senior Project Associate position is 35 years. Age relaxation is provided for SC/ST and OBC categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. How will candidates be selected for the Senior Project Associate role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an initial email application, followed by shortlisting of eligible candidates, and finally an interview. Only shortlisted candidates will be called for the interview.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this AIIMS Delhi recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Senior Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated monthly salary of Rs. 59,245 per month for the Senior Project Associate post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The application process for the Senior Project Associate post at AIIMS Delhi is through email. Candidates need to send their application and required documents to the official email address.

faq.question: Q8. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Project Associate post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Senior Project Associate position at All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi).

faq.question: Q9. What kind of experience is preferred for this role?
faq.answer: Candidates with experience in clinical research or a related field are preferred. Additionally, 2 years of research experience is required for graduate applicants.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the "Important Links" section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.
